name: Repair the add helper
problem_statement: Fix add.py so add(a, b) returns the arithmetic sum.

name: Record ordered tool state
problem_statement: Update state.txt so it records prepare, edit, and verify in that order.

name: Repair the add function
problem_statement: The local Rust crate has a failing unit test because add subtracts instead of adding. Fix the implementation so the tests pass.
